title: Worker contract requires structured fields for replan_required outcomes
expectedSnippets: if outcome.kind is replan_required, include replanReason, failedAssumption, and recommendedAdjustment

title: Worker contract requires broad validation and finalReview on the final completion path
expectedSnippets: run broad validation, include finalReview, and use validationScope: broad
forbiddenSnippets: targeted validation is enough for final completion

title: Reviewer contract preserves needs_fix as the same-feature continuation gate
expectedSnippets: return needs_fix when implementation should continue on the same feature

title: Plan contract keeps planning context separate from the persisted plan payload
expectedSnippets: Record planning context separately via flow_plan_context_record
